description_long: This shotgun features a robust, elongated barrel with a dark metallic finish and a series of ribbed or vented structures along the upper midsection, likely for heat dissipation. The stock is a solid, olive-green component with a traditional full shape, providing stability and comfort for the user. The receiver area is detailed with visible mechanical elements, including a prominent pump mechanism beneath the barrel, and several small colored accents, possibly for safety or operational indicators. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger securely. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality, suitable for urban tactical or defensive scenarios. The finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights, and the construction appears to be primarily metal with polymer or composite elements in the stock.
description: A robust, dark-metal shotgun with a full olive-green stock, ribbed barrel section, and a visible pump mechanism. The design is utilitarian and built for durability, with both matte and glossy finishes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the olive-green stock, ribbed barrel section, and pump mechanism.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the symmetry of the ribbed upper section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, barrel, and pump mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's end and the alignment of the barrel and pump, with the ribbed section visible along the top.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
